ead.archdesc:
======= RMM00462Frederick Law Olmsted collection462Compiled by L. Wodehouse, P. McCrayDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
July 20022B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
planThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:51:41 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Frederick Law Olmsted collection
Olmsted, Frederick Law, 1822-1903.
Olmsted, Frederick Law, 1870-1957.
Olmsted, John Charles.
462
.3 cubic feet.
1877-1939. Drawings, maps, negatives, manuscripts, reports, brochures. Copies of sketches, planting plans, maps, and general plans of gardens, parks, private estates, and portions of cities with material from various firms. Also "Ancestral Register of Frederick Law Olmsted, c. 1592-1878," and reports and brochures dealing with Olmsted. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 ======= 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2080477
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
L. Wodehouse, P. McCray
Date completed:
1963-1986
EAD encoding:
Julia Guarneri, July 2002
EAD encoding:
Serge Agbre, September 2008
Last modified:
Marcie Farwell, March 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Copies of sketches, planting plans, maps, and general plans of gardens, parks, private estates, and portions of cities in Chicago, Boston, Long Island, Massachusetts, New York, Pennsylvania, and other places, with material from various firms, including Olmsted, Olmsted, and Eliot; F. L. Olmsted and Co.; F. L. and J. C. Olmsted; and Olmsted Brothers - Landscape Architects, run by Frederick Law Olmsted, Jr. and John Charles Olmsted;"Ancestral Register of Frederick Law Olmsted, c. 1592-1878," and reports and brochures dealing with Olmsted. All materials relating to Roland Park in Baltimore, Maryland has been transferred to the Special Collections at Johns Hopkins University.
General
Geographical Location
Folder Number
California
1
Connecticut
7
Florida
1
Illinois
8
Kentucky
2
Maine
1
Maryland
1
Massachusetts
5, 10
Mount Royal
1
New Jersey
3
New York
4, 11
Ohio
2
Pennsylvania
6
Rhode Island
3
Washington, D.C.
1
Wisconsin
1
SERIES LIST
General
Items related to Roland Park in Baltimore, Maryland that were part of this collection have been transferred to the Special Collections at Johns Hopkins University.
Cite As:
Frederick Law Olmsted architectural drawings and plans, #462. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Maps. Genealogies. Architectural drawings. Landscape architecture.
2080477 <<<<<<< HEAD Series I. Olmsted Collection of Drawings (Listed by City)AlbanyWashington Park18914
Scope and Contents
